description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its blended upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsBlended upper One main compartment with one zipped pocket and a metallic handle design cut through the top with crystal embellishments  and a magnetic buttoned closureZipped pocket on the backOne metallic embellishment on the right sideMaterial and CareBlendedWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 7 cm
